name: Spinach Fritters
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. frozen spinach (10 oz.), well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the spinach, bread crumbs, beaten egg, nutmeg, salt, and sugar together.
2. Gradually add milk to the mixture until it forms a stiff batter.
3. Fry the fritters by spoonfuls in deep fat.
4. Remove the fritters when they rise to the top.
5. Drain excess oil on paper towels and serve hot.
6. Sprinkle with vinegar for added flavor.
